diffs.diff:
--- a/check_env2.py
+++ b/check_env2.py
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+import os

+import subprocess

+

+def run(cmd):

+    print(f"--- {cmd} ---")

+    res = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)

+    if res.stdout: print("STDOUT:\n" + res.stdout.strip())

+    if res.stderr: print("STDERR:\n" + res.stderr.strip())

+

+run("ls -l /usr/bin/python*")

+run("/opt/py312/bin/python -c \"import sys; sys.path.append('/opt/VLABench'); from VLABench.evaluation.evaluator.base import Evaluator; print('Evaluator OK')\"")

+run("/opt/py312/bin/python -m pip install h5py scipy")

+run("/opt/py312/bin/python -m pip list | grep -i h5py")
